desc.0: Press <IconNormal /> to activate:
desc.1: Launch up to five attacks against enemies ahead, dealing <ct color=#A6C5FD>Wind DMG</ct>.
desc.2: During the 5th attack, Velina's Anti-Interrupt Level increases, and DMG taken is reduced by 40%.

desc.0: Press <IconEvade /> to activate:
desc.1: A quick dash dodge.
desc.2: Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

desc.0: Press <IconNormal /> during a dodge to activate:
desc.1: Delivers a quick attack forward, dealing <ct color=#A6C5FD>Wind DMG</ct>.

desc.0: Press <IconNormal /> during a <ct color=#FFFFFF>Perfect Dodge</ct> to activate:
desc.1: Launch a series of attacks on the target, dealing <ct color=#A6C5FD>Wind DMG</ct>.
desc.2: Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

SpecialAttackWindShearPurgingSurge.name: Special Attack: Wind Shear - Purging Surge

desc.0: Press <IconSpecial /> to activate:
desc.1: Unleash a sweeping gust forward, dealing <ct color=#A6C5FD>Wind DMG</ct>.

EXSpecialAttackWindShearPurifyingRise.name: EX Special Attack: Wind Shear - Purifying Rise

desc.0: With enough Energy, press <IconSpecialReady /> to activate:
desc.1: Dodge backward, then unleash a massive wind blast to attack enemies, dealing <ct color=#A6C5FD>Wind DMG</ct>.
desc.2: During the backward dodge, a dodge effect is active. Successfully dodging an enemy attack triggers <ct color=#FFFFFF>Vital View</ct>.
desc.3: After using this skill, press <IconNormal /> to chain into the 5th hit of the <ct color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack</ct>.
desc.4: Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

EXSpecialAttackWindShearTripleDeathblow.name: EX Special Attack: Wind Shear - Triple Deathblow

desc.0: With enough energy and after using <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack: Wind Shear - Purifying Rise</ct>, press or hold <IconSpecialReady /> to activate:
desc.1: Continuously swing the fan, dealing <ct color=#A6C5FD>Wind DMG</ct>.
desc.2: After using this skill, press <IconNormal /> to chain into the 5th hit of the <ct color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack</ct>.
desc.3: Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

EXSpecialAttackWindShearEyeOfTheStorm.name: EX Special Attack: Wind Shear - Eye of the Storm

desc.0: With 90 or more <Term:1000008>, hold <IconSpecial /> or <IconNormal /> to activate:
desc.1: Velina channels a whirlwind and summons a <Term:1000016> to continuously attack enemies and triggers the previous character's <ct color=#FFFFFF>Quick Assist</ct>.
desc.2: <ct color=#FFFFFF>Sweeping Cyclone</ct> lasts for 5s and deals <ct color=#A6C5FD>Wind DMG</ct> to nearby enemies once every 0.5s.

desc.0: When a <ct color=#FFFFFF>Chain Attack</ct> is triggered, select the character to activate:
desc.1: Transform into a hurricane to unleash multiple attacks against enemies, followed by a Finishing Move, dealing massive <ct color=#A6C5FD>Wind DMG</ct>.
desc.2: Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

desc.0: When Decibel Rating is at <ct color=#FFFFFF>Maximum</ct>, press <IconUltimateReady /> to activate:
desc.1: Unleash multiple attacks against enemies ahead, dealing massive <ct color=#A6C5FD>Wind DMG</ct>.
desc.2: After using this skill, the previous character's <ct color=#FFFFFF>Quick Assist</ct> is triggered.
desc.3: Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

desc.0: When the active character is launched, press <IconSwitch /> to activate:
desc.1: Unleashes consecutive attacks against the target, dealing <ct color=#A6C5FD>Wind DMG</ct>.
desc.2: Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

desc.0: When the on-field character is about to be attacked, press <IconSwitch /> to activate:
desc.1: Parries the enemy's attack, dealing massive Daze.
desc.2: Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

desc.0: Press <IconNormal /> after a <ct color=#FFFFFF>Defensive Assist</ct> to activate:
desc.1: Unleash a series of attacks, dealing <ct color=#A6C5FD>Wind DMG</ct>.
desc.2: Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

desc.0: When Velina's initial Energy Regen exceeds 1.2, every additional 0.01 increases DMG dealt by 0.21%, up to a maximum increase of 35%, and increases Anomaly Mastery by 0.5, up to a maximum increase of 84.
desc.1: When Velina enters the battlefield, she gains 45 <Term:1000008>. In Investigation Zone mode, this effect can trigger once every 180s. Using <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack: Wind Shear - Purifying Rise</ct> or <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack: Wind Shear - Triple Deathblow</ct> grants 45 <ct color=#FFFFFF>Windbloom</ct>, up to a maximum of 135 <ct color=#FFFFFF>Windbloom</ct>.
desc.2: When Velina triggers <ct color=#FFFFFF>Vortex</ct>, she gains 1 point of <Term:1000014> and summons a <Term:1000015>, dealing <ct color=#A6C5FD>Wind DMG</ct>. This effect can trigger once every 3s. When Velina has 2 points of <ct color=#FFFFFF>Windbite</ct>, the next time she triggers <ct color=#FFFFFF>Vortex</ct>, 2 points of <ct color=#FFFFFF>Windbite</ct> are consumed to increase that <ct color=#FFFFFF>Vortex</ct>'s DMG Multiplier by <ct color=#2BAD00>90%</ct>. In addition, a <ct color=#FFFFFF>Condensed Cyclone</ct> is no longer summoned, and a <Term:1000016> is summoned instead. This does not grant <ct color=#FFFFFF>Windbite</ct>.
desc.3: When Velina's summoned <ct color=#FFFFFF>Sweeping Cyclone</ct> hits an enemy suffering <ct color=#FFFFFF>Contamination</ct> for the first time, it triggers <Term:1000017>, converting it into a <ct color=#FFFFFF>Sweeping Cyclone</ct> of the corresponding attribute, dealing the corresponding attribute's DMG. When <ct color=#FFFFFF>Sweeping Cyclone</ct> hits an enemy, the enemy's <ct color=#A6C5FD>Wind Anomaly Buildup RES</ct> is reduced by 7% for 35s. Repeated triggers reset the duration. If a <ct color=#FFFFFF>Sweeping Cyclone</ct> enhanced by <ct color=#FFFFFF>Chromatic Tint</ct> hits an enemy, the enemy's corresponding <ct color=#FFFFFF>Attribute Anomaly Buildup RES</ct> is also reduced by 7% for 35s. Repeated triggers reset the duration.
desc.4: When an enemy affected by <ct color=#FFFFFF>Sweeping Cyclone</ct> is defeated, the duration of that <ct color=#FFFFFF>Sweeping Cyclone</ct> is extended by 5s. This effect can only trigger once for the same <ct color=#FFFFFF>Sweeping Cyclone</ct>, and only one <ct color=#FFFFFF>Sweeping Cyclone</ct> can exist at a time.
desc.5: <ct color=#FFFFFF>Condensed Cyclone</ct> and <ct color=#FFFFFF>Sweeping Cyclone</ct> trigger an explosion when they dissipate. If this explosion hits an enemy suffering a <ct color=#A6C5FD>Wind Anomaly</ct>, it triggers one instance of <ct color=#FFFFFF>Abloom</ct> DMG against the target: resolves an additional instance of Attribute Anomaly DMG, dealing fixed <ct color=#2BAD00>85%</ct> and <ct color=#2BAD00>135%</ct> multiplier <ct color=#A6C5FD>Wind Anomaly DMG</ct>.

desc.0: When another character in your squad is an <ct color=#FFFFFF>Anomaly</ct> character or shares the same attribute:
desc.1: Velina's <ct color=#A6C5FD>Windswept</ct> and <ct color=#FFFFFF>Vortex</ct> DMG increases by 10%. When the heavy attack from an <ct color=#FFFFFF>Ultimate</ct> hits an enemy suffering a <ct color=#A6C5FD>Wind Attribute Anomaly</ct>, it triggers an instance of <ct color=#FFFFFF>Abloom</ct> DMG against the target: resolves one additional instance of Attribute Anomaly DMG, fixed at <ct color=#A6C5FD>680%</ct> of <ct color=#A6C5FD>Wind Attribute Anomaly DMG</ct>.
desc.2: For <ct color=#FFFFFF>Core Passive: Breeze in Bloom</ct>, the <ct color=#FFFFFF>Attribute Anomaly Buildup RES</ct> reduction from <Term:1000016> is further increased by 7%, while Daze inflicted increases by 30%, and accumulated Attribute Anomaly Buildup increases by 15%.

1.name: Orderly Elegance
1.desc: <ct color=#FFFFFF>Sweeping Cyclone</ct> from <ct color=#FFFFFF>Additional Ability: Tea Party Etiquette</ct> deals an additional 20% Daze. When Velina triggers <ct color=#FFFFFF>Vortex</ct>, she ignores 20% of the target's <ct color=#FFFFFF>All-Attribute RES</ct>. When squad members deal <ct color=#A6C5FD>Windswept</ct> DMG, 20% of the target's <ct color=#A6C5FD>Wind RES</ct> is ignored.

2.name: Saturation Project
2.desc: When Velina triggers <ct color=#A6C5FD>Windswept</ct>, she can also gain 1 point of <ct color=#FFFFFF>Windbite</ct>. This effect can trigger once every 5s. After <ct color=#FFFFFF>Sweeping Cyclone</ct> triggers the <ct color=#FFFFFF>Chromatic Tint</ct> effect, it can accumulate the corresponding attribute's Anomaly Buildup. The buildup accumulated by this attack is excluded from Anomaly DMG calculations. The DMG increase effects of Velina's <ct color=#A6C5FD>Windswept</ct> and <ct color=#FFFFFF>Vortex</ct> from <ct color=#FFFFFF>Additional Ability: Tea Party Etiquette</ct> are further increased by 15%.

3.name: Conquest by Etiquette
3.desc: <ct color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack</ct>, <ct color=#FFFFFF>Dodge</ct>, <ct color=#FFFFFF>Assist</ct>, <ct color=#FFFFFF>Special Attack</ct>, and <ct color=#FFFFFF>Chain Attack</ct> Lv. +2

4.name: Tea Party Tribunal
4.desc: When Velina uses an <ct color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack</ct>, her ATK increases by 15% for 40s. Repeated triggers reset the duration.

5.name: Death Witch
5.desc: <ct color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack</ct>, <ct color=#FFFFFF>Dodge</ct>, <ct color=#FFFFFF>Assist</ct>, <ct color=#FFFFFF>Special Attack</ct>, and <ct color=#FFFFFF>Chain Attack</ct> Lv. +2

6.name: Chief Angel
6.desc: When Velina consumes 2 points of <ct color=#FFFFFF>Windbite</ct> to increase the DMG Multiplier of <ct color=#FFFFFF>Vortex</ct>, she gains 1 point of <ct color=#FFFFFF>Windbite</ct>. This effect can trigger once every 6s. When Velina hits an enemy suffering a <ct color=#A6C5FD>Wind Attribute Anomaly</ct>, the <ct color=#A6C5FD>Wind Attribute Anomaly Buildup</ct> she inflicts increases by 20%. When Velina inflicts <ct color=#A6C5FD>Windswept</ct> on an enemy already affected by <ct color=#A6C5FD>Windswept</ct>, the new <ct color=#A6C5FD>Windswept</ct>'s DMG increases based on the remaining duration of the previous. Each remaining second increases the DMG by 2.5%, up to a maximum of 40%.
